prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of Anri Okita, an adult Japanese woman with a sleek short dark-brown bob haircut, center part, fair skin, black rectangular eyeglasses, defined brows, subtle eye makeup, and vivid red lipstick. She is standing close to the camera on a city street at golden hour, looking directly into the lens with a calm confident expression. She wears a fitted ribbed ivory-white long-sleeve off-shoulder deep V-neck dress, a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant, dangling gold earrings, and a thin gold chain shoulder strap from a purse. Compose as an upper-body fashion portrait from slightly above chest level, shallow depth of field, natural realistic skin texture, soft warm sunset rim light, cinematic urban background with parked cars, asphalt road markings, modern buildings, and a storefront sign reading “VINO BAROLO” on the left. Use high detail, realistic proportions, natural color grading, crisp focus on the face and glasses, softly blurred background, no watermark, no extra text, no distorted hands, no cartoon or illustration style.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of Anri Okita, an adult Japanese woman with a sleek short dark-brown bob haircut, center part, fair skin, black rectangular eyeglasses, defined brows, subtle eye makeup, and vivid red lipstick. She is standing close to the camera on a city street at golden hour, looking directly into the lens with a calm confident expression. She wears a fitted ribbed ivory-white long-sleeve off-shoulder deep V-neck dress, a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant, dangling gold earrings, and a thin gold chain shoulder strap from a purse. Compose as an upper-body fashion portrait from slightly above chest level, shallow depth of field, natural realistic skin texture, soft warm sunset rim light, cinematic urban background with parked cars, asphalt road markings, modern buildings, and a storefront sign reading “VINO BAROLO” on the left. Use high detail, realistic proportions, natural color grading, crisp focus on the face and glasses, softly blurred background, no watermark, no extra text, no distorted hands, no cartoon or illustration style.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖版街头肖像，主角是 Anri Okita，一位成年日本女性，留着利落的深棕色短波波头，中分发型，皮肤白皙，佩戴黑色长方形眼镜，眉形清晰，画着精致的眼妆，涂着鲜艳的红唇。她站在城市街道上，靠近镜头，在黄金时刻的阳光下直视镜头，表情冷静自信。她身穿一件修身的象牙白长袖露肩深 V 领罗纹连衣裙，佩戴一条带有小吊坠的精致金项链、金质耳坠，肩上背着带有细金链条的包。构图为胸部以上位置的时尚肖像，采用浅景深，呈现自然的真实皮肤质感，柔和温暖的夕阳轮廓光，电影感的城市背景，包括停放的汽车、柏油路标线、现代建筑，左侧有一块写着“VINO BAROLO”的店招。要求高细节、比例真实、自然色彩分级，面部和眼镜焦点清晰，背景柔和虚化，无水印，无额外文字，无扭曲的手部，非卡通或插画风格。
